en: It may be difficult to tell the difference between this vowel, the short vowel i, and another sound, the long vowel i.
ko: 짧은 모음 i와 긴 모음 i를 구별하기 어려울 수 있어요.

en: Listen carefully to hear the difference between the two.
In each pair of examples, I'll say the short sound i first. hit, heat, lip, leap, sick, seek, will, will.
ko: 각 쌍에서 짧은 소리를 먼저 말합니다. hit, heat, lip, leap, sick, seek, will, wheel.

en: Now you try. Listen carefully and repeat after me. hit, heat, lip, leap, sick, seek, will, will.
ko: 이제 따라해 보세요. hit, heat, lip, leap, sick, seek, will, wheel.
